iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.sensor.CfnAbo:
An input component that reports the environmental condition of a vehicle.

**Note**  
You can collect data about fluid levels, temperatures, vibrations, or battery voltage from sensors.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.sensor.Allowe.Description: (Optional) A list of possible values a sensor can take.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.sensor.DataTy.Description: The specified data type of the sensor.
iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.sensor.DataTy.Allowed values: BOOLEAN | BOOLEAN_ARRAY | DOUBLE | DOUBLE_ARRAY | FLOAT | FLOAT_ARRAY | INT16 | INT16_ARRAY | INT32 | INT32_ARRAY | INT64 | INT64_ARRAY | INT8 | INT8_ARRAY | STRING | STRING_ARRAY | UINT16 | UINT16_ARRAY | UINT32 | UINT32_ARRAY | UINT64 | UINT64_ARRAY | UINT8 | UINT8_ARRAY | UNIX_TIMESTAMP | UNIX_TIMESTAMP_ARRAY | UNKNOWN

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.sensor.Descri.Description: (Optional) A brief description of a sensor.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.sensor.FullyQ.Description: The fully qualified name of the sensor. For example, the fully qualified name of a sensor might be `Vehicle.Body.Engine.Battery`.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.sensor.Max.Description: (Optional) The specified possible maximum value of the sensor.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.sensor.Min.Description: (Optional) The specified possible minimum value of the sensor.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.sensor.Unit.Description: (Optional) The scientific unit of measurement for data collected by the sensor.
